grades.expectation: Response references CA Protocol section 4.0 or 4.1 specifically
grades.reason: Explicitly references 'CA Protocol Section 4.0 on Planning Permission'

grades.expectation: Response mentions the 4-year enforcement period for operational development
grades.reason: States 'the 4-year rule for operational development/change of use applies' and mentions works completed over 4 years ago

grades.expectation: Response discusses whether indemnity insurance is appropriate vs obtaining retrospective consent
grades.reason: Discusses indemnity insurance for works under 4 years and mentions regularization certificate option for works under 12 months

grades.expectation: Response mentions building regulations as a separate concern from planning
grades.reason: No mention of building regulations at all - only discusses planning permission

grades.expectation: Response references specific enforcement timeline rules (4yr/10yr/12mo)
grades.reason: References 4-year rule and 12-month threshold for regularization certificate
